mapper.select: SELECT id, subject_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM topic ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, subject_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM topic WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, subject_id, parent_id, name, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM topic WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
